title: Design System Candidate
description: Structured signal that a local exploration may reveal a reusable design-system opportunity. This contract does not promote anything into the package by itself.

status.description: Review status of the candidate signal.

problem_observed.description: What the existing DS material did not support well enough in this run.

user_need.description: User need or decision need that the candidate could support.

evidence_from_run.description: Concrete observations from the run that justify keeping this as a candidate signal.

existing_ds_material_reused.description: Existing components, primitives, tokens or guidelines the candidate builds on.

risks_or_guardrails.description: Risks that must be handled before the candidate could become reusable.

source_guidelines.description: Guideline paths used to evaluate the candidate.
